metadata.title: Privacy Policy | Beyond Gluten
metadata.description: Beyond Gluten Platform Privacy Policy: How we collect, use, and protect your data. We are committed to the highest standards of security and transparency.
metadata.keywords: privacy policy beyond gluten, terms of use, data protection gluten free platform, privacy policy

sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.body: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you contact us via our website forms. This may include your name and email address.

sections.title: How We Use Your Information
sections.body: We use the information we collect to respond to your inquiries, improve our website and products, and send occasional updates if you have opted in.

sections.title: Data Protection
sections.body: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information. We do not sell, trade, or share your personal data with third parties except as required by law.

sections.title: Cookies
sections.body: Our website may use cookies to enhance your browsing experience. You can control cookie settings through your browser preferences.

sections.title: Contact
sections.body: If you have any questions about this privacy policy, please contact us at hello@beyondgluten.com.
